name: Anchovy Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove yolks from eggs and mash them in a bowl.
2. Stir in mayonnaise, minced anchovies, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, 1 tablespoon of chopped parsley, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Place the filling into a pastry bag.
4. Pipe the filling into egg whites.
5. Garnish with capers and remaining parsley.
6. Cover and chill until serving time.
120 cal, 9 gr fat, 68% fat.
